case_title: ANN ELIZABETH ECKHOFF VS. ALAN GREEN

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR, MATTER PALCED BACK ON THE COURT CALENDER FOR 7-28-21. MATTER ORIGINALLY SET FOR TRIAL ON 6-28-21. NO APPEARAANCE WAS MADE AND MATTER WAS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NOTICE WERE SENT. DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR, THE HEARING DATE ON PLAINTIFFS CLAIM IS SET FOR 7-28-21.
